name: Indian Knowledge System
description: Introduction to traditional Indian systems of knowledge and their relevance.

name: Data Structures
description: Linear and non-linear data structures, implementations and complexity.

name: Discrete Mathematics
description: Logic, set theory, combinatorics, graphs and discrete structures used in CS.

name: Digital Logic and Circuit Design
description: Boolean algebra, combinational and sequential circuits, minimization techniques.

name: Object Oriented Programming
description: Principles of OOP, classes, objects, inheritance, polymorphism and design patterns.

name: Computational Methods
description: Numerical techniques and computational algorithms for engineering problems.
